content_body:
This past Mother's Day weekend, we had the pleasure of hosting another event for The Giving Kitchen! This time around, we had Jay Swift of 4th & Swift cook for our group at Serendipity on Friday and Saturday night. During the weekend, we also enjoyed tubing, a visit to Mercier Orchards, and visiting some of our favorite spots in downtown Blue Ridge.

Two of the guests from that weekend were kind enough to send us a letter afterward in which they stated:

"[We] cannot thank you enough for the extremely wonderful time spent in Blue Ridge. We realize our support of The Giving Kitchen put us there, but the memories, service and attention to detail provided went well beyond our expectations. As our family has grown, times like these away from our respective busy lives have become more and more difficult. The MM weekend was something we were all looking forward to and having it occur on Mother's Day weekend made it even more special. The cabin was perfect, the food incredible and the family time will never be forgotten!"

It is moments like the ones we shared with such wonderful people during this weekend that make us so thankful to do what we do. We loved getting to know everyone throughout the weekend, and we were thrilled to have the opportunity to support this amazing charity. We look forward to hosting many more events in the future!

 

*Pictures to come!*
title: Giving Back to The Giving Kitchen
